summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 11 — Booking Commitment + Execution Handoff. Backend: 38/38 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified including ExecutionDashboard with summary strip, status filters, event cards; ExecutionDetail with 4 tabs (Handoff, Team, Checklist, Changes); all modals (Create Handoff, Assign Owner, Acknowledge, Update Status, Add Checklist, Update Checklist, Add Change Request, Resolve CR).

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - React hydration warning from dynamic option rendering, does not affect functionality

backend_dashboard.returns_confirmed_bookings: PASS - Returns confirmed bookings with handoff status, readiness posture, days_until_event
backend_dashboard.item_structure: PASS - Items have lead_id, customer_name, event_type, handoff_status, readiness_posture, approaching_soon
backend_dashboard.summary_counts: PASS - Returns summary with total, no_handoff, pending_handoff, assigned, in_preparation, ready, blocked, approaching_soon

backend_handoff.get_full_data: PASS - Returns booking_snapshot, execution, pre_event_readiness, checklist, change_requests
backend_handoff.create_prevents_duplicate: PASS - Returns 400 if snapshot already exists
backend_handoff.create_success: PASS - Creates snapshot with locked_at timestamp, execution with pending status, default checklist items

backend_assignment.assign_requires_handoff: PASS - Returns 400 if no handoff exists
backend_assignment.assign_success: PASS - Assigns owner, sets status to 'assigned'
backend_assignment.acknowledge_success: PASS - Sets status to 'acknowledged', records acknowledged_at

backend_checklist.get_items_and_readiness: PASS - Returns items array and computed readiness posture
backend_checklist.add_success: PASS - Creates item with checklist_id, category, status=pending
backend_checklist.update_status: PASS - Updates status, recomputes readiness posture

backend_change_requests.list_success: PASS - Returns change_requests array and total count
backend_change_requests.create_success: PASS - Creates CR with cr_id, cr_type, status=open
backend_change_requests.create_all_types: PASS - Accepts all 5 CR types (customer_requirement, venue_change, commercial_change, schedule_change, special_requirement)

backend_readiness_computation.posture_logic: PASS - Computes posture based on item statuses (blocked > ready > in_progress > not_started)

backend_legacy_backfill.booking_readiness_migration: PASS - Legacy leads get booking_readiness field at startup

frontend_execution_dashboard.page_loads: PASS - ExecutionDashboard page loads with data-testid='execution-dashboard-page'
frontend_execution_dashboard.summary_strip: PASS - Shows No Handoff, Pending, Blocked, Ready counts
frontend_execution_dashboard.search_input: PASS - Search input present and functional
frontend_execution_dashboard.status_filters: PASS - Filter chips (All, No Handoff, Pending, Assigned, Acknowledged, In Prep, Ready)
frontend_execution_dashboard.event_cards: PASS - Cards show customer name, venue, event type, city, status badge, readiness indicator

frontend_execution_detail.page_loads: PASS - ExecutionDetail page loads with data-testid='execution-detail-page'
frontend_execution_detail.tabs: PASS - 4 tabs present (Handoff, Team, Checklist, Changes)
frontend_execution_detail.status_badge: PASS - Shows current handoff status (Ready, Pending, etc.)
frontend_execution_detail.back_navigation: PASS - Back button navigates to dashboard

frontend_handoff_tab.locked_snapshot: PASS - Shows 'Locked on' date with venue, event details
frontend_handoff_tab.key_notes: PASS - Shows Customer Requirements, Promises Made, RM Handoff Notes
frontend_handoff_tab.customer_contact: PASS - Shows customer name, phone, email, RM, confirmed date

frontend_team_tab.handoff_status_flow: PASS - Visual status progression (Pending → Assigned → Acknowledged → In Prep → Ready)
frontend_team_tab.execution_owner: PASS - Shows owner name, assigned date, acknowledged status
frontend_team_tab.update_status_btn: PASS - Opens Update Status modal (when status=acknowledged/in_preparation)

frontend_checklist_tab.readiness_posture: PASS - Shows posture badge (NOT STARTED, IN PROGRESS, BLOCKED, READY)
frontend_checklist_tab.progress_bar: PASS - Visual progress bar with done/pending counts
frontend_checklist_tab.grouped_items: PASS - Items grouped by category (venue_coordination, customer_communication, etc.)
frontend_checklist_tab.toggle_items: PASS - Click toggles item status (pending ↔ done)

frontend_changes_tab.change_requests_list: PASS - Shows CRs with type badge, status badge, description, impact
frontend_changes_tab.resolved_cr: PASS - Shows resolution and resolved_by info
frontend_changes_tab.add_cr_btn: PASS - Opens Add Change Request modal
frontend_changes_tab.resolve_btn: PASS - Opens Resolve CR modal (when status=open/under_review)

frontend_modals.create_handoff: PASS - Modal with venue name, event time, requirements, promises, notes inputs
frontend_modals.assign_owner: PASS - Modal with owner name, team member, role, notes inputs
frontend_modals.add_checklist: PASS - Modal with task, category select, assigned to, due date, notes inputs
frontend_modals.update_checklist: PASS - Modal with status select, assigned to, due date, notes inputs
frontend_modals.add_change_request: PASS - Modal with type select, description, impact, requested by inputs
frontend_modals.resolve_cr: PASS - Modal with status select, resolution input

critical_code_review_comments: execution.py: Well-structured 639-line backend with clear status flows (HANDOFF_STATUSES, CR_TYPES, CR_STATUSES, CHECKLIST_STATUSES, CHECKLIST_CATEGORIES, READINESS_POSTURES)
execution.py: Handoff package locks commercial snapshot at booking confirmation - prevents re-creation
execution.py: Default checklist templates (8 items) auto-created on handoff creation
execution.py: Readiness posture auto-computed from checklist item statuses (blocked > ready > in_progress > not_started)
execution.py: Dashboard sorts by approaching_soon first, then blocked, then no_handoff, then by days_until_event
execution.py: RM can only access their own cases, admin can access all
ExecutionDashboard.js: Clean summary strip with 4 key metrics (No Handoff, Pending, Blocked, Ready)
ExecutionDashboard.js: Approaching event alert when events within 7 days
ExecutionDetail.js: Comprehensive 811-line component with 4 tabs and 8 modals
ExecutionDetail.js: Handoff status flow visualization with numbered steps
ExecutionDetail.js: Checklist items grouped by category with toggle functionality

test_credentials.rm: rm1@venuloq.in / rm123 (role: rm - can manage own cases)
test_credentials.admin: admin@venuloq.in / admin123 (role: admin - can access all cases)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test lead lead_4f7a8e81c605 (Phase11 Test Wedding) with full handoff data. Created TEST_ prefixed checklist items and change requests during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 11 Execution Handoff fully tested. Backend endpoints at /api/execution/* all working. Frontend routes at /team/rm/execution (ExecutionDashboard) and /team/rm/execution/:leadId (ExecutionDetail). Handoff statuses: pending → assigned → acknowledged → in_preparation → ready. CR types: customer_requirement, venue_change, commercial_change, schedule_change, special_requirement. CR statuses: open, under_review, approved, rejected, implemented. Checklist statuses: pending, in_progress, done, blocked, na. Checklist categories: venue_coordination, customer_communication, logistics, vendor_management, documentation, payment, other. Readiness postures: not_started, in_progress, blocked, ready. Test lead lead_4f7a8e81c605 has full handoff data. RM-owned lead lead_f216035fb407 has pending handoff.

real_apis: All execution handoff endpoints are real (no mocking)
